mapper.select: SELECT * FROM base_data_product_sku WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND available = TRUE ORDER BY code
mapper.sql: SELECT s.id AS id, s.id AS sku_id, s.code AS sku_code, s.code AS code, p.id AS product_id, p.code AS product_code, p.name AS name, p.name AS product_name, s.sale_property_text AS sale_property_text, p.category_id AS category_id, c.name AS category_name, p.brand_id AS brand_id, b.name AS brand_name, p.spec AS spec, p.unit AS unit, p.product_type AS product_type, s.available AS available FROM base_data_product_sku AS s INNER JOIN base_data_product AS p ON p.id = s.product_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_brand AS b ON b.id = p.brand_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_category AS c ON c.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN recursion_mapping AS rm ON rm.node_id = p.category_id and rm.node_type = 2
mapper.select: SELECT s.* FROM base_data_product_sku_code sc INNER JOIN base_data_product_sku s ON s.id = sc.sku_id AND s.available = TRUE INNER JOIN base_data_product p ON p.id = s.product_id AND p.available = TRUE WHERE sc.code = #{code} ORDER BY sc.is_main DESC, s.code LIMIT 1

SELECT s.* FROM base_data_product_sku_code sc INNER JOIN base_data_product_sku s ON s.id = sc.sku_id AND s.available = TRUE INNER JOIN base_data_product p ON p.id = s.product_id AND p.available = TRUE WHERE sc.code = #{code} ORDER BY sc.is_main DESC, s.code
mapper.update: UPDATE base_data_product_sku s INNER JOIN ( SELECT r.sku_id, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(p.name, '：', i.name) ORDER BY p.code SEPARATOR ' / ') AS sale_property_text FROM base_data_product_sku_sale_property_relation r INNER JOIN base_data_product_sale_property_definition p ON p.id = r.property_id INNER JOIN base_data_product_sale_property_item i ON i.id = r.property_item_id WHERE r.sku_id IN ( SELECT sku_id FROM base_data_product_sku_sale_property_relation WHERE property_id = #{propertyId} ) GROUP BY r.sku_id ) t ON t.sku_id = s.id SET s.sale_property_text = IFNULL(t.sale_property_text, '') WHERE s.id IN ( SELECT sku_id FROM base_data_product_sku_sale_property_relation WHERE property_id = #{propertyId} )
